## [Phase 2] Testing — Feature Validation

This issue was automatically created by the workflow.

### Related Initiative
- **Main Initiative Issue**: {{MAIN_ISSUE_URL}}
- **Knowledge Base**: [{{KB_NAME}}]({{KB_URL}})

### Objective

Validate that the feature works correctly and meets all acceptance criteria.

### Tasks

#### 1. Test Execution
- [ ] Run unit tests
- [ ] Run integration tests
- [ ] Execute end-to-end tests covering the new feature
- [ ] Verify all acceptance criteria from Phase 0

#### 2. Regression Testing
- [ ] Verify no regressions in related features
- [ ] Test edge cases and error scenarios
- [ ] Validate performance impact

#### 3. Documentation & Cleanup
- [ ] Update user-facing documentation
- [ ] Update API documentation (if applicable)
- [ ] Confirm feature is ready for release

### Expected Deliverables

1. **Test Results** — All tests passing
2. **Acceptance Sign-off** — All criteria verified
3. **Release Notes** — Summary of the feature for release
